# virtualbox_disk (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `file_path` (String) Absolute path for the disk file.
- `size` (Number) Disk size in megabytes.

### Optional

- `format` (String) Disk format. Must be one of: `VDI`, `VMDK`, `VHD`.
- `variant` (String) Disk variant. Must be one of: `Standard`, `Fixed`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the disk medium.
- `last_updated` (String)
